---
title: Reaxys
alias: &ALIAS reaxys
href: https://www.reaxys.com/
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

Reaxys is an Elsevier chemistry intelligence platform providing access to experimentally validated reactions, substances, and bioactivity data to support drug discovery and chemical synthesis workflows.

## Key Features

- Contains over 500 million experimentally validated chemical reactions with synthesis conditions
- Integrates substance properties, bioactivity data, and pharmacological records
- Retrosynthesis planning tools assist in designing synthetic routes for novel compounds
- Covers patent literature, journal articles, and historical chemical handbooks
- Supports structure-based and property-based querying for targeted compound discovery

## Use Cases in Research

- Designing synthesis routes for novel antimicrobial compounds identified through virtual screening
- Identifying prior art and literature-validated reactions for antibiotic analog synthesis
- Mining bioactivity data for natural product scaffolds with antimicrobial or microbiome-modulating activity
- Supporting medicinal chemistry optimization of antibiotic leads with experimental reaction data
- Integrating Reaxys bioactivity data with other chemical databases for comprehensive SAR analysis

## Getting Started

Visit [Reaxys](https://www.reaxys.com/) to access the database.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
